summary: EXP-377-pickup-ISS-1589 proposes a single-phrase patch to build-scripts/generate-html.js line 1522 — replace "anchored independently from any observation file" with "independently timestamped separately from any observation data" to match the eg-falsifiability source prose (line 1748) verbatim. No data/truth-content change; rebuild required to land in docs/index.html. review_class=verification (downgraded from baby-escalation deep-attack per PROP-025 author honesty — single-clause wordsmithing, batchable with other verification items in curmudgeon Step 8a). After patch + rebuild, decider can close ISS-1589 fix_details="EXP-377-pickup-ISS-1589 module Condition 2 verbatim-matched to source".
